calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randy Rabidoux appeared by zoom for and with Paul Pinto by zoom and Michelle Rabkin by zoom.

The court stated that it looked at the papers and that it is impressed as to how long the parties have known each other before they got married. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.
